rule_summary: Study-specific compiler rules for Sarkar 2020 as an initiation-only bulk context family. These rules preserve that the family contributes bounded early age-movement context but does not earn heterogeneity-resolving authority.

conditions.condition_summary: Sarkar initiation-only bulk condition used as early age-movement context without heterogeneity resolution.
source_locators: Early age-movement context without subpopulation resolution
conditions.rule_basis: Treat Sarkar as a bounded initiation-phase context family: useful for early age-linked movement, but too coarse to support heterogeneity-sensitive identity or risk claims on its own.
